element_text:
HTTP Test
Plain HTTP request. Expected High if observed.
http://example.com/?source=privacy_eval_apk&type=http

First-party HTTPS Test
Allowlisted HTTPS request. Expected Low if allowlist includes example.com.
https://example.com/?source=privacy_eval_apk&type=first_party

External HTTPS Test
Non-allowlisted HTTPS request. Expected Middle if observed.
https://httpbin.org/get?source=privacy_eval_apk&type=external

External POST Test
POST request to external domain. Expected Middle/High depending on policy.
https://httpbin.org/post

Tracker-like HTTPS Test
Analytics-like endpoint. Expected Middle if tracker classification is enabled.
https://www.google-analytics.com/g/collect?v=2&tid=G-TEST000&cid=test-client&en=test_event
